summary: Completed comprehensive testing of constrained widget drag system using dnd-kit. All core requirements verified: vertical-only movement within left/right columns, no cross-column dragging, fixed AI Core, proper drag handles, and intact dashboard layout with correct content counts.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads at /dashboard with all content intact
Left sortable container (data-testid='left-sortable') present with 3 panels
Right sortable container (data-testid='right-sortable') present with 3 panels
All 6 drag handles present with data-testid starting with 'drag-handle-'
All panels present: panel-attention, panel-projects, panel-trades, panel-schedule, panel-urgent, panel-financial
AI Core (ai-core-placeholder) is NOT draggable — no drag handle found (properly fixed in center)
All content counts correct: 3 attention items, 3 projects, 4 trades, 4 schedule items, 4 urgent tasks
Action buttons and overview grid still present in center column
Login page loads correctly and unaffected by drag system (0 drag handles on login)
All drag handles show proper 'grab' cursor on hover and are interactive
Panels properly distributed: 3 in left column, 3 in right column
SortableStack configured with restrictToVerticalAxis modifier for constrained movement
Expected dnd-kit SSR hydration warning present (harmless)
Dashboard layout integrity maintained after drag system implementation
